title: Extended Trimming
description: A small Data+Resource-Pack that expands upon trimming.
body:
This Project is on hold for now. I might revisit it later.

### **📋 About**
This pack adds Trims for Elytra, Wolf Armor and Horse Armor.

***

### **⚙️ Compatibility**
I haven't tested it with any other Data pack, I'll be sure to add an incompatibility list further down the line if there are any. If you encounter any issues, you can report them to me on PMC or CurseForge.

***

### **📜 Roadmap**
Some things I want to add, thinking about adding or is already in progress:
- More Materials that feel like they could work in Vanilla. (as vanilla as it can get, with Data and Resource packs of course)
- Tool and Weapon trims for every type of Trim.
- Anything related to trimming, open for ideas

***

### **✅ Recommendations**
If you cannot wait for Trimmable Weapons and Tools, I suggest using [Trimmable Tools](https://modrinth.com/datapack/trimmable-tools) by [Apollo](https://modrinth.com/user/Apollo). The (for now?) mod version even achieves what I am planning to do with this Data pack!

***

<details>
<summary>📄 Terms of Use</summary>

You can:

✅- Use it on a server (in game download!) or in mod packs

✅- Use and edit it for YouTube videos and Content Creator edits (Linking back preferably but not needed)

You cannot:

❌- Redistribute edited or unedited assets

❌- Re-upload the pack

These terms may be changed as we deem necessary and at any time.
</details>
